mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT sido_name AS value, sido_name AS label FROM dongcodes WHERE sido_name IS NOT NULL AND sido_name <> '' ORDER BY sido_name
SELECT DISTINCT gugun_name AS value, gugun_name AS label FROM dongcodes WHERE sido_name = #{sidoName} AND gugun_name IS NOT NULL AND gugun_name <> '' ORDER BY gugun_name
SELECT DISTINCT dong_name AS value, dong_name AS label FROM dongcodes WHERE sido_name = #{sidoName} AND gugun_name = #{gugunName} AND dong_name IS NOT NULL AND dong_name <> '' ORDER BY dong_name
